notes: Two mounting-height tables (standard + accessible) by fixture class and age band, distilled from 22 1000 2.46. Gaps (standard drinking-fountain bubbler heights; accessible WC seat heights for elementary/preK; standard urinal lip at preK) are not in the planning extracts — see OQ-14.
